mapper.select: SELECT id, reservation_no, room_id, emp_id, meeting_title, start_time, end_time, description, remind_status, status, create_time, update_time FROM meeting_reservation WHERE emp_id = #{empId} ORDER BY start_time DESC

SELECT mr.id, mr.reservation_no AS reservationNo, mr.room_id AS roomId, mr.emp_id AS empId, mr.meeting_title AS meetingTitle, mr.start_time AS startTime, mr.end_time AS endTime, mr.description, mr.status, rm.room_name AS roomName FROM meeting_reservation mr LEFT JOIN meeting_room rm ON mr.room_id = rm.id WHERE mr.room_id = #{roomId} AND DATE(mr.start_time) = #{date} AND mr.status = 1 ORDER BY mr.start_time ASC
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING(reservation_no, 11) AS UNSIGNED)), 0) FROM meeting_reservation WHERE reservation_no LIKE CONCAT('HY', #{datePrefix}, '%')
